name: ResizableRoot
description: Root controller for resizable panels. Flex container with drag handles between panels.
whenToUse: Split-pane layouts where users need to resize sections (IDE layouts, dashboards).
avoidWhen: Fixed layouts - use Grid or Stack.

parts.name: ResizablePanel
parts.description: A resizable panel within a ResizableRoot.

parts.name: ResizableHandle
parts.description: Drag handle between ResizablePanels with optional visual grip indicator.
parts.whenToUse: Always between ResizablePanels inside a ResizableRoot.
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Has role='separator' with keyboard arrow support. Home/End keys resize to min/max.

withHandle.description: Shows a visual grip indicator for drag affordance.
